assertions.description: PCB is a 4-layer board (F.Cu, In1.Cu power plane, In2.Cu power plane, B.Cu) with verified complete routing (0 unrouted), 87 vias, 1923 track segments, and ENIG surface finish. All match design intent for a precision analog burn-in board.

assertions.description: The design intentionally uses per-reference-block isolated ground domains (GND_heater, GND_zener) to prevent ground-loop interference between the 20 LM399 voltage references. The analyzer correctly identifies 11 domains with no zones (isolated routing), reflecting the precision analog design intent.
